reviews.review_msg: Great Professor, great class.  If you want to gain a real business world entrepreneurial experience this is the prof and this is the class!  If you just want to memorize crap out of a textbook, then I suggest moving along.  This class and this prof are for those who want to take what they learn to the real world.
he is awesome. Shares real life example which makes the course more interesting . Remember to select a good team partner as it affects your grade later on .Good luck !!!!

If you ever wanted to grab a beer after class with a prof, he is the guy. The coolest prof I have ever had. The class information is invaluable( e.g. learn how to raise money and get investors!). Although class is unco-ord. at times, he tries to snap it back into place. No exams and assignments are not hard at all (actually a bit fun).

Highly Recommended. One of the class you will learn something which you can really apply when you are out to the business world. It will take so much time to finish all the assignments, yet i find they are interesting. Real business stories from the prof.

Decent class if you are one of the typical people who go to class and leave right after. Very easy and frustrating if you have any actual experience. Doesn't push students hard enough. Class seemed uncoordinated at times (very inefficient lectures with non-value-added material - e.g. lots of stuff can be taught one-on-one instead).

Great prof!  Thoroughly enjoyed the class.  He knows his stuff when it comes to the real world and his experiences are really interesting.  I recommend taking this course because it's one of the best you can take in your academic career!!!

Great Prof. ... Works very hard to bring REAL WORLD experience to the classroom. Probably because hes a Real World Business person, not a theoretical business person like so many profs.... The best class i ever took in 6 years at SFU.
Excellent prof, fair, and a good person to know in general.
Super passionate about his students and topics... has lots of great stories. Great guy to have in your network!
